creator: igor.polovykh@gmail.com
text: I've found cause of clang crashes and rebooting while compilation. It just was overheating of CPU when temperature of all cores raised above 70°C. Short time compilations didn't give such behaviour. Sorry. It's my fault but I think this case will be useful for someone with similar situation. Perhaps it's possible to make special exception when clang crashes by similar cause and write appropriate message to log.
